title: Add more recipes
description: This is a data pack that adds recipes not available in Minecraft.  This data pack is still under construction
body:
## Overview
This data pack adds new recipes that are not available in vanilla Minecraft.

## Compatibility
- ~~Designed for Minecraft 1.16.5~~
- Even if a data pack is created for a specific version, it may be usable with other versions as well.(1.12.2/1.16×/1.17x/1.18x/1.19x/1.20/1.20.1/1.21–1.21.4). 
- Conflicts may occur with other recipe data packs or mods
###  ・Platforms
- Data Pack
- Fabric
- Forge
- NeoForge
- Quilt

## Notes
**Recipe contents may change in future updates.**

**The mod version might be better installed on both the server and client sides. If you want to ensure stability solely on the server side, we recommend the data pack version.**

Slightly compatible with [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

This datapack/mod was created with large-scale boss battle mods such as [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) and [L_Ender 's Cataclysm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lendercataclysm) in mind. It is intended to be used alongside similar content, and may be considered overpowered or make the game too easy when used in a vanilla Minecraft world.

You can see all of these recipes at [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)



There is a discord server where you can post your thoughts, opinions, requests, and reports about this data pack.　[discord server](https://discord.gg/dgUTrVzC2D)
